case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. SAMUEL GARCIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, SAMUEL $10,997.12 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $452.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,249.12, SEE SCANNED DOC
